sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n10707" key="a)ntixo/ria" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντιχόρια</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τά</gen>, <sense id="n10707.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">odes sung alternately by two semichori,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:4:107" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.107</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
